name: Alexandro Wiggins
profileStatus: Firsthand military witness and congressional witness
profileSummary: Active-duty U.S. Navy Senior Chief Petty Officer who submitted a firsthand account of a February 2023 UAP event and discussed it publicly in congressional testimony and an interview.
background: U.S. Navy Senior Chief Petty Officer and operations specialist.
inclusionNote: Included as a witness profile, not labeled as a whistleblower. His record tests how witness testimony, interviews, claims, organizations, and supporting documents connect.
